outlook_paragraph: SM shows zero active drilling sites at decision date, with no newly or continuously active pads, indicating a complete halt in near-term drilling activity heading into the final quarter of 2020. The relative activity delta of -0.5 reflects a sharp decline compared to recent trends, suggesting constrained production growth. With WTI averaging around $40.74 and realized prices discounted at 88%, revenue is further limited by only 55% exposure to the targeted segment. The deterministic revenue forecast stands at $339M, anchored to consensus due to absence of active drilling signals.
